introSection: This was a steel roller coaster which operated at Amusementspark Tivoli and later at Anna's Hove. It was built partially over a Boat Ride.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Footage of the roller coaster at Anna's Hoeve

fullText:
This was a steel roller coaster which operated at Amusementspark Tivoli and later at Anna's Hove. It was built partially over a Boat Ride.


 * Footage of the roller coaster at Anna's Hoeve
